REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT DOES NOT SUFFICIENTLY STATE A CAUSE OF ACTION AGAINST DEFENDANT EUGENE GARDNER FOR (1) QUIET TITLE, BECAUSE IT DOES NOT SUFFICIENTLY PLEAD THAT THE LOAN IS VOID OR THAT THE PURCHASE WAS IMPROPER, (2) FINANCIAL ELDER ABUSE, BECAUSE IT DOES NOT SUFFICIENTLY PLEAD THAT DEFENDANT GARDNER'S USE OF THE PROPERTY WAS WRONGFUL, (3) DECLARATORY RELIEF, BECAUSE IT DOES NOT SUFFICIENTLY PLEAD PROSPECTIVE RELIEF. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH COMPLIANCE CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES ; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-17-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Monica Castillo 415-757-4510 of Legal Assistance to the Elderly appearing viz Zoom for plaintiff Rosemarie Benter
Dustin E. Owens; Owens & Ross; 707-441-1185; appearing by Zoom for defendant Eugene Gardner.
Jaiying Li; Cummins & White, LLP; 949-852-1800; appearing via Zoom for defendants/cross-complainants Michael Bruno and Cal-West Home Loans, Inc. dba Cal West Realty.
Sean Phillips; Wood, Smith, Henning & Berman LLP; 707-559-6750; appearing via Zoom for defendant/cross-complainant/cross-defendant Laura Ferris Biche.

Counsel for plaintiff requests for clarification regarding tentative. Discussed. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to the other parties the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend. The First Amended Complaint does not sufficiently state a cause of action against Defendant Eugene Gardner for (1) quiet title, because it does not sufficiently plead that the loan is void or that the purchase was improper, (2) financial elder abuse, because it does not sufficiently plead that Defendant Gardner's use of the Property was wrongful, (3) declaratory relief, because it does not sufficiently plead prospective relief.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the court's tentative ruling and in compliance with compliance CRC 3.1312(b)

Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-27-2023 Continued To Nov-17-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Dustin E. Owens; Owens & Ross; 707-441-1185; appearing as counsel for defendant Eugene Gardner.
Jaiying Li; Cummins & White, LLP; 949-852-1800; appearing as counsel for defendants/cross-complainants Michael Bruno and Cal-West Home Loans, Inc. dba Cal West Realty.
Sean Phillips; Wood, Smith, Henning & Berman LLP; 707-559-6750; appearing as counsel for defendant/cross-complainant/cross-defendant Laura Ferris Biche.

Mr. Owens contests the date of continuance and states that he has a conflict. The parties present agree to change the date from November 3 to Novemeber 17, 2023. Mr. Owens is instructed to give notice to plaintiff of the new hearing date. The parties are excused and the court adopts the tentative ruling as modified:

DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to November 17, 2023 on Court's own motion.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
